title: artplants.de False rose NAJMA, cream, 65 cm, Ø 11 cm - Artificial rose
features: Artificial flower stem from the artplants collection NAJMA
description: Product description Important information from artplants.de: If you have questions about our products, tips for decoration, care and much more, we are also available by phone and e-mail. For further contact information, please click on our seller name. Delivery without decoration and cachepots (if not mentioned otherwise) Please note that some artificial plants (or quantities of them) require fire protection treatment in certain rooms. Products comply with B3 according to DIN4102-1 - please observe individual regulations. For a long-lasting colour fidelity an optional treatment with artplants.de UV Protection Spray at regular intervals is recommended. The need for repetition depends on the location. Safety Warning This artificial plant complies with fire protection standards B3 according to DIN4102-1. For outdoor use, follow individual regulations. To maintain color fidelity, treat with artplants.de UV Protection Spray at regular intervals.
